Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-AE Assign Reviewers when followed by SW-Reviewer Declined compared to when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer No Response in cases where no agreement is reached
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the subsequent Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Average time for SW-AE Assign Reviewers to be completed in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept versus those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases involving multiple reassignments (e.g., Unassign Reviewer or Assign a Different Editor)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'

Name: Time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in successful review paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants without any reminder activities
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes SW-AE Assign Reviewers to result in at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed after repeated attempts
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from the first occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers to the final SW-Reviewer Agreed in complex reviewer selection variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Duration of SW-AE Assign Reviewers phase in variants that include SW-Reviewer Selection is now due or late notifications
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Unavailable in cases where reviewers become unavailable post-assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in cases where sufficient reviewers agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
